productDisplayName: Spykar Men Wind Rider White Cream T-Shirts
description: Composition Cream round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline, graphic print on the front and on the upper back Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Celebrate the spirit of cycling and ride with the wind with this spykar t-shirt. Enjoy the pleasure of cutting through the wind in this tee dedicated to the cycling club of Flanders Classics, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with cycling shorts and cycling shoes when on the move or with denims or corduroys and sports shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
